GitFetchKind.description:
The kind of git fetch a caller is asking the host to perform.

This is deliberately small and transport-neutral. The kernel does not expose git library concepts such as refspecs, packfiles, trees, or indexes.

oneOf.description: Fetch just enough metadata to resolve a ref / inspect a manifest.
Fetch a single tree snapshot without history where the executor can.
Shallow clone / checkout bounded by host policy.

RedactionState.description:
Redaction state for an outbound audit record.

Every outbound request carries one of these states to indicate whether raw body/header/prompt/response data was preserved. The default is `NotCaptured` — raw data is never saved unless explicitly approved.

oneOf.description: Raw data was redacted before recording.
Only a policy reference is stored; no data captured.
Request was blocked as unsafe; no data recorded.
Explicit user/host approval to capture raw data (rare).

Payload.description:
Request sent to a git outbound executor.

The request carries refs and policy shape only. Authentication is expressed as secret refs; raw tokens must never appear here.

capability_id.description: Capability through which the request was made.

destination_hint.description: Optional host-internal destination hint. The executor may ignore it.

fetch_kind.description: Fetch shape requested by the caller.

metadata.description: Opaque package-owned metadata. Must not contain raw secrets.

package_id.description: Package that initiated the git fetch request.

redaction_state.description: Redaction state carried forward from policy/audit.

reference.description: Branch, tag, or commit SHA requested by the caller.

remote_url.description: Public HTTPS git URL. Non-HTTPS transports are rejected by policy.

secret_refs.description: Secret references only. Private repos are not enabled in G1, but the field is part of the public shape so raw tokens never become accepted.

Payload.title: GitOutboundRequest

description: Payload schema for event kind kernel/v1/git_fetch.requested.
title: kernel/v1/git_fetch.requested
